title: What Happened
content:
- Had a minor disagreement with Donal. After churning, they attempted a Stripe chargeback for 2 months.
- OO won the dispute — Stripe sided with OO after Donal submitted substantial evidence.
- Outcome depended heavily on how the complaint was framed to Stripe and the evidence provided.

title: Lesson
content:
- Keep delivery evidence on file (reports sent, emails, work logs) — essential for dispute defence
- Chargeback outcome depends on framing. Strong evidence + clear documentation = win.
